name: Feature request
about: New feature or improvement
title: ''

---

**Problem or goal**
What’s missing or what do you want to improve? (e.g. real networking, 64-bit, more syscalls)

**Proposed solution**
How could BTFOS/GOAT-OS address it while keeping the graph/cognition design?

**Alternatives**
Any other approaches you’ve considered.

**Additional context**
Links, references, or use cases.
